user.title: Plant Manager
user.description: Plant Manager monitors your soil moisture sensors and sends watering reminders. After setup, go to Configure to add your plants. Each plant is linked to a moisture sensor entity and optionally a battery sensor and Google Calendar.

data_description.notify_service: The full Home Assistant notify service to use for watering reminders. Find yours under Developer Tools → Services, look for notify.*. Leave blank to skip notifications.
data_description.digest_times: One or more times per day (24h format) when Plant Manager will check for dry plants and send a reminder. Separate multiple times with commas, e.g. 07:00,18:00.

init.title: Plant Manager
init.description: Manage your plants and notification settings. Use **Add a plant** to link a new soil sensor. Use **Configure** at any time to edit thresholds, add a battery sensor, or connect a calendar.

data.name: Plant name
data.min_increase: Minimum moisture increase to detect watering (%)

data_description.moisture_sensor_entity_id: The sensor entity that reports soil moisture for this plant.
data_description.battery_sensor_entity_id: Optional. Monitors the sensor battery and alerts when low.
data_description.calendar_entity_id: Optional. When a watering reminder fires, an all-day watering event will be created on this calendar.
data_description.low_threshold: The plant is flagged as needing water when moisture drops below this value.
data_description.battery_low_threshold: For WH51 and similar voltage-reporting sensors, enter the voltage level to treat as low (e.g. 1.1 for AA batteries). For percentage-based battery sensors, enter a percentage (e.g. 15).
data_description.min_increase: A moisture reading must rise by at least this amount to be counted as a watering event. Prevents false detections from sensor noise.
data_description.min_interval_days: Suppresses repeat watering reminders for this many days after the last notification.

settings.title: Notification settings
settings.description: Configure where and when watering reminders are sent. Plant Manager sends a digest listing all dry plants at the scheduled times — it only sends if at least one plant needs water.

data_description.notify_service: The full Home Assistant notify service to use for watering reminders. Find yours under Developer Tools → Services, look for notify.*. Leave blank to skip notifications.
data_description.digest_times: One or more times per day (24h format) when Plant Manager will check for dry plants and send a reminder. Separate multiple times with commas, e.g. 07:00,18:00.

add_plant.title: Add plant
add_plant.description: Link a soil moisture sensor to a new plant. The plant will appear as a device in Home Assistant with status, moisture, last-watered, and days-since-watered entities.

data.name: Plant name
data.min_increase: Minimum moisture increase to detect watering (%)

data_description.zone: Indoor or outdoor. Used to group plants in summary counts and digest notifications.
data_description.location_label: Free-text location shown in notifications and calendar events (e.g. 'Family Room', 'Front Door').
data_description.moisture_sensor_entity_id: The sensor entity that reports soil moisture for this plant.
data_description.battery_sensor_entity_id: Optional. Monitors the sensor battery and alerts when low.
data_description.calendar_entity_id: Optional. When a watering reminder fires, an all-day watering event will be created on this calendar.
data_description.low_threshold: The plant is flagged as needing water when moisture drops below this value. Typical indoor plants: 25–35%. Succulents/cacti: 10–15%.
data_description.battery_low_threshold: For WH51 and similar voltage-reporting sensors, enter the voltage level to treat as low (e.g. 1.1 for AA batteries). For percentage-based battery sensors, enter a percentage (e.g. 15).
data_description.min_increase: A moisture reading must rise by at least this amount to be counted as a watering event. Prevents false detections from sensor noise. Recommended: 5–10%.
data_description.min_interval_days: Suppresses repeat watering reminders for this many days after the last notification. Set to 1 to allow daily reminders.
data_description.alerts_enabled: Uncheck to silence all notifications for this plant without removing it.

remove_plant.title: Remove plant
remove_plant.description: Select one or more plants to remove. The plant device and all its entities will be removed from Home Assistant.
